articles.title: Delhi isn't flexing yet as India's ethanol dream gets an early reality check
articles.excerpt: Only four flex-fuel passenger vehicles have been registered in Delhi since the technology entered the market last month, highlighting a slow start despite the government's push for ethanol-blended fuels to reduce crude oil imports.
articles.content: Only four flex-fuel passenger vehicles have been registered in Delhi since the technology entered the market last month, highlighting a slow start despite the government's push for ethanol-blended fuels to reduce crude oil imports.
